_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: Rac1 activation was increased 2.6-fold in Nf2−/− SC NPCs relative to their WT counterparts
details: Successfully detected 2.6-fold increase in Rac1 activation in Nf2−/− SC NPCs relative to WT counterparts
